title: Sources: Bournemouth close on Rose appointment
summary: Bournemouth is nearing the appointment of Marco Rose as their new manager, according to ESPN sources. The move represents a significant managerial change for the Premier League club.
content: Bournemouth are closing in on Marco Rose as their new manager, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 伯恩茅斯接近确定任命罗斯为新主教练
zh.summary: 据ESPN消息人士报道，伯恩茅斯俱乐部接近确定任命马尔科·罗斯为新任主教练。这项举动代表了这支英超俱乐部在主教练位置上的重大变更。

title: Cole: 'Discouraged' by coaching opps. in England
summary: Former Chelsea defender Ashley Cole has expressed frustration with limited managerial opportunities in England, calling his appointment at Serie B side Cesena a "massive leap of faith." Cole's move abroad highlights the challenges for experienced English coaches seeking top roles domestically.
content: Former Chelsea defender Ashley Cole has said he felt "discouraged" by the lack of managerial opportunities in England and is grateful for Serie B side Cesena for the "massive leap of faith" in appointing him.

zh.title: 科尔：对英格兰的教练机会感到灰心
zh.summary: 前切尔西后卫阿什利·科尔对英格兰有限的主教练机会表示失望，他将自己被任命为意大利乙级联赛球队切塞纳的主教练称为"重大赌注"。科尔的出国执教凸显了经验丰富的英格兰教练在寻求国内顶级职位时所面临的挑战。

title: Slot: Ekitike will come back stronger after injury
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has described Hugo Ekitike's Achilles injury as "devastating" but expressed confidence the striker will return stronger. The injury marks a significant setback for the Reds' attacking depth.
content: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has described Hugo Ekitike's Achilles injury as "devastating" but has backed the striker to "come back even stronger".

zh.title: 斯洛特：埃基蒂克伤愈后将重返巅峰
zh.summary: 利物浦主教练阿尔内·斯洛特将雨果·埃基蒂克的阿基里斯腱伤称为"令人沮丧的"，但他对这位前锋将以更强姿态回归充满信心。这次伤势对红军的锋线深度造成了重大打击。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Bayern eye Tottenham's Archie Gray
summary: Tottenham midfielder Archie Gray is a transfer target for both Liverpool and Bayern Munich ahead of the summer window. The interest from two European powerhouses reflects Gray's potential as a young midfield prospect.
content: Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Archie Gray is being considered for a summer move by Bayern Munich and Liverpool. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻、新闻：利物浦、拜仁关注热刺的阿奇·格雷
zh.summary: 热刺中场球员阿奇·格雷是利物浦和拜仁慕尼黑在夏季转会窗口前的转会目标。两大欧洲豪门的关注反映了格雷作为年轻中场新星的潜力。

title: All your FPL stats and Premier League team news in one place
summary: BBC Football has compiled comprehensive Fantasy Premier League statistics and team news into a centralized resource. The hub provides fans with essential information for squad selection and league competition.
content: Every key bit of Premier League team news and the most important Fantasy Premier League statistics - all in one place.

zh.title: 你的所有英超幻想联赛数据和英超球队新闻汇总
zh.summary: BBC体育将英超幻想联赛的综合数据和球队新闻编制成了一个集中资源。该中心为球迷提供了球队选择和联赛竞争的必要信息。

title: Leicester need something special to beat drop - Rowett
summary: Leicester City manager Gary Rowett says belief will be crucial as the Foxes battle increasingly dire odds in their Championship survival fight. Rowett emphasizes that something special will be needed to escape relegation.
content: Leicester City boss Gary Rowett says "belief" in increasingly dire times will be key to the Foxes' Championship survival hopes.

zh.title: 莱斯特城需要做出非凡表现才能逃脱降级——罗维特
zh.summary: 莱斯特城主教练加里·罗维特表示，信念将至关重要，因为狐狸队在英冠保级战中面临日益艰难的局面。罗维特强调需要做出非凡表现才能逃脱降级。

title: Can Arsenal hold off Man City? Will Atlético win Copa del Rey?
summary: ESPN previews the weekend's major matches, including potential title deciders in England and Germany and the Copa del Rey final. Pundit Julien Laurens provides predictions for the high-stakes fixtures.
content: We've got potential title deciders in England and Germany, a grudge match in Portugal, and the Copa del Rey final: Julien Laurens previews the weekend and makes his predictions.

zh.title: 阿森纳能挡住曼城吗？马竞能赢得西班牙国王杯吗？
zh.summary: ESPN预览了本周末的主要比赛，包括英格兰和德国潜在的争冠关键战以及西班牙国王杯决赛。评论员朱利安·劳伦斯为这些高风险的比赛提供了预测。

title: Ranked: Who are the top 50 players in the Premier League right now?
summary: ESPN's Premier League Top 50 rankings return with just over a month remaining in the 2025-26 season, evaluating the league's best-performing players. The rankings capture elite player performance at this crucial stage of the campaign.
content: The Premier League Top 50 returns, with just over a month remaining in the 2025-26 season, to rank the best players in the Premier League so far.

zh.title: 排名：目前英超联赛前50名球员是谁？
zh.summary: ESPN的英超前50球员排名回归，距离2025-26赛季结束还剩一个多月，评估了英超联赛表现最佳的球员。这份排名捕捉了赛季关键阶段精英球员的表现。

title: UFC star Pimblett rants about Arsenal and Arteta
summary: UFC fighter Paddy Pimblett appears on The Wayne Rooney Show and expresses strong criticism of Arsenal and manager Mikel Arteta. The appearance blends sports entertainment with football commentary.
content: The Wayne Rooney Show welcomes UFC star Paddy Pimblett this week, and it's fair to say, he's not a huge fan of Arsenal.

title: Quiz: Name every team to have been promoted to the Premier League
summary: BBC Football challenges fans to name all 41 teams ever promoted to the Premier League throughout its history. The quiz tests knowledge of the league's expansion and team promotions.
content: Forty-one teams have been promoted into the Premier League, can you name them all?

zh.title: 测验：说出所有曾升入英超的球队

title: FPL talking point: How to navigate a double gameweek
summary: As the Premier League returns with a double gameweek, BBC Football discusses Fantasy Premier League chip strategies for maximizing points. Proper planning is essential for capitalizing on increased fixture rounds.
content: The Premier League returns this weekend and, with a double gameweek, it is time to talk about chip strategies.

zh.title: 梦幻英超热议：如何应对双周赛
zh.summary: 随着英超回归双周赛，BBC足球栏目讨论梦幻英超奖励卡策略以最大化得分。适当规划对充分利用增加的比赛轮次至关重要。

title: McGlynn should be 'in the conversation' to be Celtic manager - Lennon
summary: Former Celtic manager Neil Lennon believes Dunfermline Athletic boss John McGlynn deserves consideration as a candidate for the Celtic manager role. McGlynn faces Falkirk in a Scottish Cup semi-final this weekend.
content: Neil Lennon reckons John McGlynn should be "in the conversation" to become the next Celtic manager as the Dunfermline Athletic boss aims to get the better of his Falkirk counterpart in Saturday's Scottish Cup semi-final.

zh.title: 麦格林应被"列入考虑"担任凯尔特人主帅 - 莱农
zh.summary: 前凯尔特人主帅尼尔·莱农认为邓弗姆林竞技主帅约翰·麦格林值得被考虑为凯尔特人主帅职位的候选人。麦格林将在本周末对阵法尔柯克参加苏格兰杯半决赛。

title: He was surprise winter deadline-day signing - how is Wilson doing?
summary: Teenage striker James Wilson was Tottenham's surprise January deadline day signing from Hearts, bringing immediate defensive and offensive prospects. BBC Sport assesses his early development and impact with the club.
content: The biggest surprise of January's transfer deadline day came when Tottenham signed teenager James Wilson from Hearts. BBC Sport looks at how he is doing.

zh.title: 他是冬季转会窗口的意外签约——威尔逊现在表现如何？
zh.summary: 少年前锋詹姆斯·威尔逊是托特纳姆热刺在1月转会截止日期的意外签约，来自哈茨队，为球队防守和进攻带来了立竿见影的前景。BBC体育评估了他在俱乐部的早期表现和影响。

title: Stewart banned from Hampden over referee criticism - gossip
summary: Former Scotland midfielder Michael Stewart has been banned from Hampden Stadium, claiming the SFA is attempting to silence dissent following his criticism of referees. The incident reflects tensions between players and Scottish football governance.
content: Former Scotland midfielder Michael Stewart accuses the SFA of "trying to silence voices of dissent" after his stadium ban, Rangers face competition from FC Koln for Hacken midfielder, while two Dundee United players could miss the rest of the season through injury.

zh.title: 斯图尔特因批评裁判被禁止进入汉普顿——闲言碎语
zh.summary: 前苏格兰中场迈克尔·斯图尔特被禁止进入汉普顿体育场，声称苏格兰足协试图在他批评裁判后压制异议。这一事件反映了球员与苏格兰足球管理层之间的紧张关系。

title: Scottish Cup semi-final preview
summary: BBC Football hosts Andy Halliday and Scott Allan to preview the weekend's Scottish Cup semi-final matches. The analysis covers key storylines and matchups in the competition's penultimate round.
content: Andy Halliday and Scott Allan join Charlotte Cohen to preview all the weekend’s action

title: Fernandez back to face Man Utd but Chelsea's problems remain
summary: Enzo Fernandez returns to Chelsea's lineup this weekend to face Manchester United, providing a boost to the squad's midfield. However, the midfielder's return alone is unlikely to resolve the deeper questions surrounding Chelsea's overall performance and consistency.
content: Enzo Fernandez returns for Chelsea this weekend, but questions remain.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯回归对阵曼联但切尔西问题依然存在
zh.summary: 恩佐·费尔南德斯本周末将回归切尔西阵容对阵曼彻斯特联队，为球队中场带来助力。然而，这位中场球员的回归单靠自己不太可能解决围绕切尔西整体表现和稳定性的更深层问题。

title: What is Scotland's most iconic goal? This week - Gemmill v Dalglish
summary: Scottish football fans are invited to vote on the nation's greatest goal, with iconic moments from players like Gemmill and Dalglish competing for the title. The poll aims to determine which strike stands as Scotland's most memorable in football history.
content: Vote to find out what goal will be crowned Scotland's greatest.

zh.title: 苏格兰最标志性的进球是什么？本周 - 吉米尔 vs 达尔格利什
zh.summary: 苏格兰足球球迷被邀请投票选出国家最伟大的进球，来自吉米尔和达尔格利什等球员的标志性时刻争夺该称号。此投票旨在确定哪一个进球是苏格兰足球历史上最难忘的时刻。

title: The evolution of Guardiola and Arteta as managers and friends
summary: Ahead of a crucial Premier League clash between Manchester City and Arsenal, football expert Guillem Balague analyzes how managers Pep Guardiola and Mikel Arteta have evolved both professionally and personally over their careers. The examination provides insight into their competing philosophies as the title contenders prepare to meet.
content: As Manchester City prepare to host Arsenal in Sunday's crucial Premier League meeting between the top two, European football expert Guillem Balague looks at how the two managers have evolved.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉和阿尔特塔作为经理和朋友的进化
zh.summary: 在曼城和阿森纳即将进行的英超关键对话前，足球专家吉勒姆·巴拉格分析了经理佩普·瓜迪奥拉和米克尔·阿尔特塔在职业和个人生涯中的进化。这项分析为他们相竞争的哲学提供了洞察，因为这两支争夺冠军的球队准备对阵。

title: Sources: NWSL expected to vote on calendar shift
summary: The NWSL's board of governors is expected to vote this month on restructuring the league's calendar from a spring-to-fall schedule to fall-to-spring. The proposed change would have significant implications for player schedules and international competition alignment.
content: The NWSL's board of governors is expected to vote later this month on whether to flip the league's calendar to a fall-to-spring season, multiple sources told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：NWSL预计将投票改变赛历
zh.summary: 美国职业女子足球大联盟董事会预计将在本月投票决定是否将联赛赛历从春秋制改为秋春制。这一提议的改变将对球员日程安排和国际比赛协调产生重大影响。

title: The Wayne Rooney Show
summary: Wayne Rooney joins UFC fighter Paddy Pimblett to discuss the Merseyside derby, Arsenal's season performance, and insights from his transition into combat sports. The episode blends football analysis with broader sports entertainment commentary.
content: Wayne & Paddy Pimblett on the Merseyside derby, an epic Arsenal rant and life in the UFC.

zh.title: 鲁尼秀
zh.summary: 韦恩·鲁尼与UFC格斗选手帕迪·皮姆布莱特讨论默西塞德德比、阿森纳赛季表现以及他向格斗运动转型的见解。该节目将足球分析与更广泛的体育娱乐评论相结合。

title: The girl from Barry who grew up to be world class
summary: Welsh footballer Sophie Ingle from Barry is set to reach another career milestone as Wales competes in Women's World Cup qualifying against Albania. Her trajectory from a small Welsh town to elite international football exemplifies a stellar professional rise.
content: Sophie Ingle is poised for another landmark in a stellar career as Wales go to Albania in Women's World Cup qualifying.

zh.title: 来自巴里的女孩成长为世界级球星
zh.summary: 威尔士足球运动员索菲·英格尔来自巴里，她将在威尔士与阿尔巴尼亚参加女性世界杯预选赛时实现职业生涯的又一个里程碑。她从威尔士小镇到精英国际足坛的轨迹充分展示了她杰出的职业生涯进展。

title: Other clubs want to be like Wrexham, says Harvey
summary: Wrexham club director Shaun Harvey reports that other football clubs increasingly seek to emulate Wrexham's recent success and organizational culture. The recognition highlights Wrexham's compelling trajectory and the appeal of their model to peers across the sport.
content: Club director Shaun Harvey says the proudest feedback he currently hears is 'I wish our club was like Wrexham'.

zh.title: 其他俱乐部想像雷克瑟姆一样，哈维说
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆俱乐部主管肖恩·哈维表示，其他足球俱乐部越来越寻求效仿雷克瑟姆最近的成功和组织文化。这种认可突显了雷克瑟姆令人瞩目的发展轨迹以及其模式对整个体育界同行的吸引力。

title: Forest sweat on injuries after reaching UEL semi
summary: Nottingham Forest reached their first European semifinal since 1984 but sustained injuries ahead of a crucial Premier League match with Burnley. The dual demands of European competition and domestic survival test their squad depth.
content: Nottingham Forest were left with several injury concerns for Sunday's crunch Premier League clash with Burnley after reaching a first European semifinal since 1984.

zh.title: 森林队晋级欧联杯半决赛后伤病困扰
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林队自1984年以来首次晋级欧洲半决赛，但在与伯恩利的关键英超比赛前遭遇伤病。欧洲杯赛和国内联赛的双重压力考验着球队的深度储备。

title: Aaronson: Not true that USMNT players don't care
summary: USMNT player Brenden Aaronson denied suggestions the team lacks commitment ahead of the World Cup, asserting players are determined to represent their country. His response counters recent criticism of team performances.
content: Brenden Aaronson insisted that that the USMNT is determined to make the country proud, following criticism of its performances ahead of the World Cup.

zh.title: 阿伦森：美国队球员不在乎的说法不属实
zh.summary: 美国队球员布伦登·阿伦森否认了球队缺乏承诺的说法，在世界杯前表示球员们决心代表自己的国家。他的回应反驳了近期对球队表现的批评。

title: Emery looking forward to 'special' Villa-Forest semi
summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery previewed a Europa League semifinal against Nottingham Forest after eliminating Bologna 7-1 on aggregate. Emery described the all-English matchup as "special."
content: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery is looking forward to a "special" Europa League semi-final with Nottingham Forest following a 7-1 aggregate win over Bologna.

zh.title: 埃梅里期待维拉与森林的"特殊"半决赛
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉主帅乌奈·埃梅里在球队7:1击败博洛尼亚后，预览了与诺丁汉森林队的欧联杯半决赛。埃梅里将这场全英对阵描述为"特殊"。
